disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Annular plaques with a raised scaly advancing edge and central clearing, expanding outward, after new-kitten contact
trigger_question_examples: Do the rings have a raised scaly outer edge with a clearer centre, expanding outward? Any new pets?
Is the edge scaly rather than smooth?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, raised scaly outer edges with clearer centres, growing outward, and I got a kitten 2 weeks ago.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Used an OTC hydrocortisone cream which seemed to make it spread
trigger_question_examples: Have you put any steroid/cortisone cream on it, and did it change the rash?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I used a hydrocortisone cream for 2 days and it seemed to spread faster.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No hot/hard swelling, thick yellow pus or fever (secondary-infection screen)
trigger_question_examples: Any hot/hard swelling, thick yellow pus, or fever?
Is any ring becoming hot and spreading with pus?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No hot swelling, no thick pus and no fever.
